title: 16x Arda Anarchy Texture Pack
description:
Contains 100+ Custom Textures for the server Arda Anarchy. 

ardaanarchy.net 1.21.11
body:
This texture pack contains vanilla custom textures for the custom items on the 1.21.8 semi-anarchy server ardaanarchy.net.

This pack is designed in order to allow players to see the custom items, making it easier to see what type of armor your opponent is using, and to differentiate vanilla items from custom server items. Using this texture pack requires an external mod, CIT Resewn or Optifine to see the armor models. Most textures are visable without any mods.
